news.headline: Mexico is open to new tariffs on China to avoid Trump duties.
'Post-election rally that boosted stocks amidst Trump's win has now faded. S&P 500 facing worst week of 2022.'
news.summary: Following President Trump’s victory, the stock market saw a significant increase; however, the upward trend came to a halt recently. The S&P 500, a key indicator of the market's performance, was facing a challenging week, with the potential to be the worst one so far this year. Investors witnessed a sharp rise in stocks initially after the President's win, but the current data indicates a slowdown in the market's momentum.

news.headline: Shiba Inu down 5%, price at $0.00001373, market cap of $8.09 billion. Analyst predicts support at $0.000012, $0.0000094.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is experiencing a significant correction, prompting traders to monitor for possible support levels and catalysts for a bullish reversal. Currently, Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001373 with a market capitalization of $8.09 billion, showing a 5.7% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 10.5% decline over the past 7 days. Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is valued at $0.1979 with a market cap of $29.3 billion, witnessing a 5.3% drop in the last 24 hours and a 19.8% decrease in the past week. Meanwhile, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) is at $0.057911 with a market cap of $3.3 billion, reflecting a 5.6% downturn in 24 hours and a 15.8% decrease in the last 7 days. Renowned crypto analyst Ali Martinez anticipates Shiba Inu could potentially discover support at $0.000012 or $0.0000094, suggesting a possible opportunity for a rebound. #ShibaInu $SHIB might see a support level at $0.000012 or $0.0000094 according to Ali’s analysis. Shiba Inu's detailed analysis is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GSD, LLC partners with DG Fuels to open sustainable aviation fuel plant in Nebraska, supporting bioeconomy.
news.summary: GSD, LLC, in collaboration with DG Fuels and Phelps County Development Corporation, is pleased to announce their joint effort on the Phelps County project in PHELPS COUNTY, Nebraska. On Feb. 28, 2025, DG Fuels revealed plans to inaugurate a sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) production facility as part of this initiative.

news.headline: Ferrovial CEO reflects on pivotal 2024, looks ahead to 2025 in a letter to employees and shareholders, Amsterdam, Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Ferrovial, a prominent global infrastructure company, recently shared a letter from its CEO, Ignacio Madridejos, to employees and shareholders. In the letter, Madridejos reflects on the significance of the past year and outlines future plans up to 2025. The communication, released in Amsterdam on February 28, 2025, highlights the achievements of the company in 2024 and sets the stage for anticipated developments in the coming years.

news.headline: US consumer costs could rise due to tariffs per Fed paper; tariffs may impact everyday expenses.
Many altcoins to fail by 2025; only those with ETF approvals and revenue models will succeed.
news.summary: In 2025, it is projected that only alternative cryptocurrencies that secure ETF approvals and possess strong revenue-generating strategies will surpass the overall crypto market in terms of performance.

news.headline: LG&E and KU plan new generation and battery storage to meet energy needs of Kentucky's growth. Record economic growth benefits Kentuckians with job opportunities.
news.summary: The rapid economic advancement and expansion of data centers are increasing the demand for additional energy in Louisville, Kentucky. As of February 28, 2025, the state has experienced unparalleled economic growth, drawing global interest and creating numerous job openings for residents. This growth is enhancing the overall well-being of all individuals in Kentucky, with a surge in opportunities and an increase in the need for resources such as energy.

news.headline: DeliverHealth and Google Cloud join forces at HIMSS25 to revolutionize clinical documentation.
news.summary: A collaboration between DeliverHealth and Google Cloud is set to revolutionize healthcare clinical documentation methods, as announced on February 28, 2025 in Madison, Wisconsin. The partnership aims to enhance the process by which healthcare providers record patient care. This innovative approach will be showcased at HIMSS25 in Las Vegas from March 3 to 6. Attendees will have the opportunity to experience this transformation firsthand through interactive demonstrations and presentations. DeliverHealth, a key player in the field, is paving the way for advanced healthcare documentation technology, with HIMSS25 serving as a platform for showcasing their cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Taco Cabana launches new Shrimp Tacos for Lent on March 5, 2025. Limited time offer with battered shrimp, lettuce, tomato, and chipotle ranch in a fresh flour tortilla.
news.summary: Taco Cabana in San Antonio will introduce a new menu item for the Lent Season, starting from March 5, 2025. The limited-time addition of Shrimp Tacos will include battered shrimp, lettuce, tomato, and chipotle ranch in a fresh flour tortilla.

news.headline: North Shore Animal League America's 25th annual Tour For Life starts coast-to-coast road trip to promote animal rescue & adoption. #RescueRocks!
news.summary: North Shore Animal League America has kicked off its 25th annual Tour For Life®, the biggest collaborative pet adoption event globally, showcasing the life-saving efforts of shelter partners across the nation. The event, known as Rescue Rocks!, will run until mid-April. The organization aims to drive awareness and help pets find loving homes, with a focus on the staggering 25 years of successful campaigns.

SEC Commissioner Crenshaw disagrees with agency's stance on memecoins, citing vague definition that can lead to misinterpretation.
news.summary: Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw noted that the agency is working on refining its definition of memecoins due to its vague nature, which could lead to misinterpretation.

news.headline: Grand opening of Tropical Playground Oasis at International Plaza and Bay Street, inspired by Muma Children's Hospital at TGH. TAMPA, Fla., Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: TAMPA, Florida - International Plaza and Bay Street (IP) in collaboration with the Muma Children's Hospital at Tampa General Hospital (TGH) are set to unveil a new children's play area. The design of the play area mirrors that of the Muma Children's Hospital at TGH. The grand opening is scheduled for February 28, 2025. This initiative aims to provide a fun and engaging space for young patients and their families visiting the hospital.

news.headline: Senior White House Official: Press conference cancelled. It's up to Ukrainians if it can be rescheduled while Zelenskiy is still in the country.
Avirmax Biopharma begins IND studies of ABI-201 for Dry AMD gene therapy, a pioneering AAV treatment.
news.summary: In Hayward, California on February 28, 2025, Avirmax Biopharma, Inc. revealed the initiation of Investigational New Drug (IND) studies for ABI-201, an innovative AAV vector. This vector is set to be a frontrunner in AAV gene therapies, with a focus on potential first-in-class capabilities. The company is aiming to pave the way in this field by conducting rigorous research and development on ABI-201 for its efficient delivery system.

news.headline: Comerica Bank wins award for service to businesses, praised for focus on small and middle market clients by Coalition Greenwich.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Dallas, Comerica Bank was named a top bank by Crisil Coalition Greenwich for its exceptional support of small business and middle market customers. The Coalition Greenwich Awards are highly esteemed in the banking industry, evaluating banks on various criteria. Comerica Bank's recognition underscores its commitment to serving small businesses and middle market clients effectively.

news.headline: White House Official: Zelenskiy and Trump did not sign minerals deal on Friday.
Webstar Technology partners with Nelson Worldwide Architects for Bear Village Resort, Nelson ranked #9 on Building Design + Construction's Top 200 Architecture Firms for 2024.
news.summary: Webstar Technology Group (OTCQB: WBSR) based in Atlanta, announced on February 28, 2025, that Nelson Worldwide has been recognized as the 9th best architecture firm in the country for 2024 by Building Design + Construction. This prestigious ranking solidifies Nelson Worldwide's position among the top architects in the industry.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to a new low of 3.8%. This marks a significant improvement from the previous rate of 4.2%. Additionally, the economy has added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations and showcasing a strong growth trend. The latest report also highlights a notable increase in wages, with average hourly earnings rising by 3.2% over the last year. These positive indicators point towards a thriving job market and a robust economy.

news.headline: Bank7 acquires First American Mortgage, Inc., bolstering mortgage division. Acquisition announced on Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Bank7 proudly disclosed the acquisition of First American Mortgage, Inc., a reputable residential mortgage lender, on February 28, 2025. This strategic step bolsters Bank7's mortgage division and showcases their ongoing commitment to growth and expansion.

Nvidia-backed CoreWeave aims for a $4 billion IPO, with a valuation over $35 billion. CoreWeave plans to file for a U.S. listing within a week, setting up a highly anticipated debut. The company transitioned from cryptocurrency mining to AI in 2019.
news.summary: CoreWeave, a cloud computing company supported by Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA), is quickly moving towards an IPO, with plans to raise $4 billion at a valuation exceeding $35 billion. According to Bloomberg, CoreWeave could submit for a U.S. listing in the upcoming week, making it one of the most anticipated debuts of the year. Formerly focused on cryptocurrency mining, CoreWeave shifted to AI in 2019, and has thrived in this sector ever since. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: LASÉRIE introduces first AI-powered med spa experience in the US with SmartSKN, setting new skincare standard.
news.summary: EDINA, Minnesota - LASÉRIE is leading the way in skincare innovation as it becomes the first med spa in the United States to introduce SmartSKN's AI-Powered robotics lab. This groundbreaking move is set to revolutionize professional skincare standards. The development was announced on February 28, 2025, marking a significant milestone in the industry.

news.headline: American Hardwood Information Center provides free American Hardwoods Collection for architects and designers.Pittsburgh, Feb 28, 2025 - Resource includes sample kit and brochure on renewable materials.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 28, 2025, the American Hardwood Information Center announced the availability of the American Hardwoods Collection for architects and interior designers at no charge. This resource includes a sample kit and brochure providing extensive details on the abundant and renewable nature of American hardwoods.

news.headline: DLC pack on March 27, 2025, with 10+ scenario maps for single-player challenges. Released by Plymouth-based company.
news.summary: An upcoming downloadable content pack for the highly praised strategy game introduces over 10 scenario maps, offering objective-based gameplay for distinctive single-player challenges. Set to be released on February 28, 2025, the enhanced version of Sins of a Solar Empire II aims to elevate the gaming experience for players.

news.headline: Senior US Official: Clash between Zelenskiy and Trump will likely accelerate efforts to investigate waste, fraud and abuse in US aid to Ukraine.
Bushel enhances platform with financial tools for farmers/agribusinesses, offering 3.43% interest rates as of Feb 26, 2025.
news.summary: A digital payments and workflow solutions company, Bushel, based in Fargo, N.D., is broadening its platform by introducing improved financial tools specially designed for farmers and agribusinesses. The expansion will include the introduction of Bushel business accounts*, provided through The Bancorp Bank, N.A. Farmers and agribusinesses will have access to these business accounts, with competitive interest rates currently standing at 3.43% as of Feb 26, 2025. The Bancorp is a fully owned subsidiary of The Bancorp, Inc. and is a Member FDIC.

news.headline: Crypto market sees Bitcoin drop by 25% from peak, worsening overall downturn.
BTC surged to $84K as analysts see recent crash as buying opportunity. Regulatory, nation-state exposure, onchain data and TradFi show strong fundamentals.
news.summary: Recent regulatory changes, exposure to nation-states, onchain information, and integration with traditional finance demonstrate that the core strength of Bitcoin (BTC) remained intact during the recent market downturn. This resilience is evidenced by key indicators and data, highlighting the cryptocurrency's stability and robustness.

news.headline: EverCommerce Inc. to present at Citizens JMP Tech Conference on Feb. 28, 2025. (NASDAQ: EVCM) #InvestorConferences.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, EverCommerce Inc. (NASDAQ: EVCM), a prominent service commerce platform, shared that they are scheduled to present at forthcoming investor conferences.

news.headline: IPO market downturn continues as unicorns increase, but optimism for more IPOs in 2025. Investors hopeful for tech boom.
news.summary: Following a challenging year, investors are hopeful for a stronger technology IPO market in 2025, aiming to encourage more unicorns to go public. The previous year saw a slump in the IPO market, with an increasing number of unicorns yet to enter. This optimism for increased IPO activity comes as investors look to revitalize the tech sector.

news.headline: Stock market sees sharp losses: Nasdaq down for the week; Nvidia, Tesla dive, Nutanix jumps. Dow Jones stable.(Character count: 105)
news.summary: In the latest market update, the Nasdaq experienced a notable decline over the week, struggling to maintain crucial support levels, while the Dow Jones remained relatively stable. The stock market saw significant losses, with Nvidia and Tesla shares plummeting, in contrast to Nutanix stocks which surged. This weekly review indicates a challenging period for investors, as demonstrated by the fluctuations in key indices.

news.headline: Pembina Pipeline Corp files 2024 year-end disclosure documents including financial statements, management analysis.
news.summary: Pembina Pipeline Corporation has submitted its audited financial statements for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, along with management's discussion and analysis, and annual information form to Canadian securities regulators. In addition, the company has filed its Form 40-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the same period. Pembina is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PPL and on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PBA.

news.headline: Canoga Perkins introduces Private 5G with TSN demo for industrial use, integrating Moso Canopy 5GID2 radio and switch.
news.summary: Canoga Perkins, a network connectivity solutions provider, has unveiled a demonstration of its Private 5G with Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) at the Customer Experience Center in Chatsworth, Calif. The demonstration showcases a model for deploying Private 5G, emphasizing a streamlined, reliable, and secure approach tailored for industrial and enterprise applications. The setup includes the Moso Canopy 5GID2 radio and Canoga Perkins’ switch and transport solution, Sync, offering an integrated solution for optimal performance.

Century Aluminum stock surges after analyst upgrade and smelter restart potential. Price target raised to $22, trading at 5.6x/5.3x our 2025E/2026E EBITDA. Analyst estimates EBITDA of $450-500 million with a spot valuation under 4.0x.
news.summary: Shares of Century Aluminum Company (NASDAQ:CENX) saw a rise after BMO Capital analyst Katja Jancic revised the stock rating from Market Perform to Outperform. The price target for CENX was kept at $22. According to Jancic, Century's current valuation has become appealing post the recent decline. As per the analyst, CENX shares are trading at 5.6x/5.3x based on 2025E/2026E EBITDA with aluminum/MWP prices at $1.15/lb/$0.30/lb. This suggests an EBITDA range of $450 million to $500 million, indicating a spot valuation below 4.0x. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

ISO/IEC 19790:2025 and ISO/IEC 24759:2025 standards for cryptographic module security have been published, exciting the community.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, the cryptographic module validation community is celebrating the release of the latest updates to the global standards for cryptographic module security and testing. ISO/IEC 19790:2025 and ISO/IEC 24759:2025 mark significant progress in this field. These standards have been eagerly awaited by industry professionals and are considered crucial for ensuring secure cryptographic practices. These updates come after the adoption of ISO/IEC 19790:2012/Cor 1:2015 and ISO/IEC 24759:2017 which served as the foundation for FIPS 140-3 in March 2019. This development signifies a major step forward in bolstering security protocols within the industry.
